1. **AppNavigation.kt** only has a `home` route — all the other screens (Feed, Properties, Deals, Reels, Chat, Profile, Settings, OwnerDashboard, VercelExit, AIEngineering, Investors, Buyers, Revenue, Analytics, Members, About) are defined in `Screen.kt` but NOT wired into the NavHost. The HomeScreen navigates to these routes but they don't exist in the NavHost.

2. **ListScreen** uses `items(state.items.size)` which should use `items(state.items)` or `itemsIndexed` for proper recomposition.

3. **Theme.kt** — uses `dynamicColor = true` by default which means on Android 12+ it uses dynamic colors instead of the IVX brand colors. The IVX colors are defined but never used in the color scheme. This should be fixed to use IVX brand colors.

4. **AppConfig** — `OWNER_EMAIL = "iperez4242@gmail.com"` should be `owner@ivxholding.com` based on prior context. Also the version/GIT_SHA are outdated.

5. **MainActivity** — need to check what it renders.

6. The `onRefresh != {}` check in IVXScreenShell is wrong — comparing function references to a lambda will always be true.

- Wire up all screens in AppNavigation
- Fix the theme to use IVX brand colors
- Update AppConfig with correct owner email
- Fix ListScreen items usage

4. **HomeScreen.kt** - The home screen doesn't have a bottom navigation bar. It's just a long list. Should have a bottom nav with the main tabs (Home, Feed, Properties, Deals, Reels, Profile).

@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
@Composable
fun IVXScreenShell(
    title: String,
    navController: NavController,
    onRefresh: () -> Unit = {},
    content: @Composable (PaddingValues) -> Unit
) {
    Scaffold(
        topBar = {
            TopAppBar(
                title = {
                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
                        Box(
                            modifier = Modifier
                                .size(32.dp)
                                .clip(CircleShape)
                                .background(IVXGold),
                            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
                        ) {
                            Text("IV", color = IVXDark, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall)
                        }
                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(10.dp))
                        Text(title, color = IVXOnSurface)
                    }
                },
                navigationIcon = {
                    IconButton(onClick = { navController.navigateUp() }) {
                        Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "Back", tint = IVXOnSurface)
                    }
                },
                actions = {
                    IconButton(onClick = onRefresh) {
                        Icon(Icons.Default.Refresh, contentDescription = "Refresh", tint = IVXGold)
                    }
                },
                colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
                    containerColor = IVXDark,
                    titleContentColor = IVXOnSurface
                )
            )
        }
    ) { padding ->
        content(padding)
    }
}

@Composable
fun <T> ListScreen(
    title: String,
    navController: NavController,
    state: ListUiState<T>,
    onRefresh: () -> Unit,
    emptyText: String = "No items available.",
    itemContent: @Composable (T) -> Unit
) {
    ListScreenWithKey(title, navController, state, onRefresh, emptyText, itemContent) { item ->
        when (item) {
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.FeedItem -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Property -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Deal -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Reel -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Investor -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Buyer -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.Member -> item.id
            is com.rork.ivxholdings.data.model.AgentState -> "${item.agentNumber}"
            else -> item.hashCode().toString()
        }
    }
}
